# מונית רחובות והסביבה 08-9-170-170 — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A Shabbat-observant taxi service operating in Rehovot and surrounding areas, available 24/6. The business emphasizes speed (5-6 minute arrival time), accessibility via phone and WhatsApp, and reliability. The landing page should be optimized for Google and feature a prominent green call-to-action button and an active WhatsApp button. The brand projects trust, availability, and fast local service.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://08-9-170-170-6505c690.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://08-9-170-170-6505c690.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `email` (email)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About מונית רחובות והסביבה 08-9-170-170
A Shabbat-observant taxi service operating in Rehovot and surrounding areas, available 24/6. The business emphasizes speed (5-6 minute arrival time), accessibility via phone and WhatsApp, and reliability. The landing page should be optimized for Google and feature a prominent green call-to-action button and an active WhatsApp button. The brand projects trust, availability, and fast local service.

## Services/Products
- שירות מונית 24/6
- שומר שבת
- זמן הגעה עד 5-6 דקות
- כפתור וואטסאפ פעיל
- כפתור חייגן בצבע ירוק

## Target Audience
- תושבי רחובות והסביבה המחפשים שירות מונית מהיר ואמין
- תושבי רחובות והסביבה
- נוסעים עסקיים

## Industry
Transportation & Taxi Services
